visible_energy.configuration.title: Visible Energy Config
visible_energy.config.scanning.scanRadiu: Radius in blocks to scan for Flux devices
visible_energy.config.display.displayDur: Duration in seconds to display highlights
visible_energy.config.debounce.smoothing: EMA smoothing factor for energy proportion (0 = no smoothing, 1 = instant)
visible_energy.config.debounce.threshold: Minimum proportion change (%) to update energy status text
visible_energy.config.debounce.maxMissed: Consecutive missed scans before removing a device
visible_energy.scan.success: Scanning %d flux devices within %d blocks for %ds
